title: Oberoi Mall is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Oberoi Mall is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
